testcase.name: testPageTitle

failure.message: FAIL: Title mismatch. Expected: 'Vell InfoTech' | Actual: 'Vell Infotech — Best Software Training & Placement Support' expected [Vell InfoTech] but found [Vell Infotech — Best Software Training & Placement Support]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: FAIL: Title mismatch. Expected: 'Vell InfoTech' | Actual: 'Vell Infotech — Best Software Training & Placement Support' expected [Vell InfoTech] but found [Vell Infotech — Best Software Training & Placement Support] at testcase.name: testSocialMediaLinks

failure.message: FAIL: No social media links found on homepage. expected [false] but found [true]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: FAIL: No social media links found on homepage. expected [false] but found [true] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at
